ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this content block.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional heading shown above the icon grid.

SectionIntro.helper: Optional short intro shown below the heading.

Items.helper: Add as many items as you want. The first 4 items will be displayed on the website. All others will be ignored.

Title.helper: Required. Keep this short for the best layout.

IconClass.helper: Find icons at FontAwesome

Body.helper: Required. One to three short sentences works best.
